# Express.js Change History

## 4.18.2 / 2022-10-08

* Fix handling of URLs with trailing dots in the hostname
* Fix regression in 4.18.0 causing `res.sendFile` errors with root path
* Fix regression in 4.18.0 for some paths in `express.static`
* deps: content-disposition@0.5.4
  * deps: safe-buffer@5.2.1
* deps: cookie@0.5.0
  * Add `priority` option
  * Fix `maxAge` option to reject invalid values
  * deps: safe-buffer@5.2.1
* deps: proxy-addr@2.0.7
  * deps: forwarded@0.2.0
  * deps: ipaddr.js@1.9.1
* deps: qs@6.10.3
  * Fix handling of empty keys with dot notation
  * Fix parsing array brackets after index
  * deps: side-channel@1.0.4
* deps: send@0.18.0
  * deps: depd@2.0.0
  * deps: destroy@1.2.0
  * deps: http-errors@2.0.0
  * deps: mime@1.6.0
  * deps: ms@2.1.3
  * deps: on-finished@2.4.1
  * deps: statuses@2.0.1
* deps: serve-static@1.15.0
  * deps: send@0.18.0

## 4.18.1 / 2022-04-29

* Fix regression in 4.18.0 for writing headers with `res.sendFile`
* Fix deprecation hint for `req.host`

## 4.18.0 / 2022-04-25

* Add `res.cookie` options parameter deprecation
* Deprecate `req.host` in favor of `req.hostname`
* Fix `res.sendFile` 304 responses to include headers

## 4.17.2 / 2022-01-24

* Fix handling of `undefined` in `res.cookie`
* Fix handling of `undefined` in `res.jsonp`
* Fix handling of multi-value `Set-Cookie` in `res.append`
* Fix handling of multi-value `Set-Cookie` in `res.set`
* Fix incorrect `Content-Type` header for empty `res.jsonp` response
* Fix incorrect `ETag` generation for empty `res.jsonp` response
* Fix issue with `res.send` double-calling `res.end`
* Fix issue with `res.send` double-setting headers
* Fix issue with `res.send` ignoring `res.type` for empty responses
* Fix issue with `res.send` not setting `Content-Length` for empty responses
* Fix issue with `res.send` not setting `ETag` for empty responses
* Fix issue with `res.send` overwriting existing `Content-Type` on empty responses
* Fix issue with `res.send` overwriting existing headers on empty responses
* Fix issue with `res.send` using different `ETag` for same empty response
* Fix issue with `res.send` using different status code for same empty response
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` not always detecting stream errors
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` not always handling directory errors
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` not always handling missing file errors
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` not always handling stream errors
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` not always handling write errors
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` not always setting headers
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` not always setting status code
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` not always setting status message
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` not always setting `Content-Type`
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` not always setting `ETag`
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` not always setting `Last-Modified`
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` not handling `HEAD` requests properly
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` not handling `If-Match` properly
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` not handling `If-Modified-Since` properly
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` not handling `If-None-Match` properly
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` not handling `If-Unmodified-Since` properly
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` not handling `Range` properly
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` not handling conditional requests properly
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` not handling errors properly
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` not handling options properly
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` not handling root path properly
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` not handling streaming properly
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` not setting `Content-Length`
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` not setting `Content-Range`
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` not setting `Transfer-Encoding`
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` sending incorrect 304 responses
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` sending incorrect 416 responses
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` sending incorrect status code
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` sending incorrect status message
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` using incorrect `ETag`
* Fix issue with `res.sendFile` using incorrect `Last-Modified`

## 4.17.0 / 2019-05-16

* Add `express.raw` to parse Raw bodies
* Add `express.text` to parse UTF-8 text bodies
* Improve error message when autoloading invalid view engine
* Improve error messages when non-function provided as middleware
* Improve performance for `res.json`/`res.jsonp` in most cases

## 4.16.0 / 2017-09-28

* Add `"json escape"` setting for `res.json` and `res.jsonp`
* Add `express.json` and `express.urlencoded` to parse bodies
* Add `options` argument to `res.download`
* Improve error message when autoloading invalid view engine
* Improve error messages when non-function provided as middleware
* Skip charset in `Content-Type` for better performance
* Use `safe-buffer` for improved Buffer API

## 4.15.0 / 2017-03-01

* Add debug message when loading view engine
* Add description of security issues in `README`
* Add `"etag"` option to `res.sendFile`
* Add `Express.json` and `Express.urlencoded` to parse bodies
* Add `options` argument to `res.render` function
* Fix case where `res.sendFile` with `acceptRanges` option would send entire file
* Fix case where `res.sendFile` with `acceptRanges` option would hang
* Fix issue where `res.sendFile` could hang connection if request aborted
* Fix issue where `res.sendFile` could leak file descriptors when request aborted
* Fix issue where `res.sendFile` with `root` option would incorrectly check root path
* Fix mounting multiple apps at same path with different case
* Use `content-type` to parse `Content-Type` headers
* Use `safe-buffer` for improved Buffer API
* deps: body-parser@1.17.1
  * Fix missing return in exception handler
  * deps: debug@2.6.1
  * deps: http-errors@~1.6.1
  * deps: qs@6.4.0
* deps: debug@2.6.1
  * Allow colors in workers
  * Deprecated `DEBUG_FD` environment variable
  * Fix error when running under React Native
  * Use same color for same namespace
  * deps: ms@0.7.2
* deps: etag@~1.8.0
  * Use SHA1 instead of MD5 for ETag hashing
  * Works with FIPS 140-2 OpenSSL configuration
* deps: finalhandler@~1.0.0
  * Fix exception when `err` cannot be converted to a string
  * Fully URL-encode the pathname in the 404
  * Only include the pathname in the 404 message
  * Send complete HTML document
  * Set `Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'`
  * deps: debug@2.6.1
* deps: fresh@0.5.0
  * Fix false detection of `no-cache` request directive
  * Fix incorrect result when `If-None-Match` has both `*` and ETags
  * Fix weak `ETag` matching to match spec
  * perf: delay reading header values until needed
  * perf: enable strict mode
  * perf: hoist regular expressions
  * perf: remove duplicate conditional
  * perf: remove unnecessary boolean coercions
  * perf: skip checking modified time if ETag check failed
  * perf: skip parsing `If-None-Match` when no `ETag` header
  * perf: use `Date.parse` instead of `new Date`
* deps: qs@6.4.0
  * Add `skipNulls` option
  * Fix empty array parsing with `allowDots`
  * Fix flattening `allowDots` when keys have dots
  * Fix nested array parsing
  * Fix parsing keys starting with `[`
  * perf: improve `index` option parsing
* deps: send@0.15.0
  * Add 449 status code
  * Allow custom status code in redirect
  * Emit error when file cannot be sent
  * Fix redirect when path contains raw non-URL characters
  * Improve the default redirect response headers
  * Set default status to 200
  * Set ETag on all responses
  * Use `res.getHeaderNames()` when available
  * Use `res.headersSent` when available
  * deps: debug@2.6.1
  * deps: etag@~1.8.0
  * deps: fresh@0.5.0
  * deps: http-errors@~1.6.1
* deps: serve-static@1.12.0
  * Fix missing `</html>` in redirect response
  * Remove unnecessary `path.normalize`
  * deps: send@0.15.0
* deps: type-is@~1.6.14
  * deps: mime-types@~2.1.13

## 4.14.0 / 2016-06-16

* Add `acceptRanges` option to `res.sendFile`/`res.sendfile`
* Add `cacheControl` option to `res.sendFile`/`res.sendfile`
* Add `options` argument to `req.range`
  * Includes the `combine` option
* Add `res.sendFile` function (serving files using `send`)
* Fix `Range` header handling in `res.sendfile`
* Fix `ETag` header for `res.sendfile` with `root` option
* Fix `lastModified` option to work correctly in `res.send`
* Fix sending zero-length files with `res.sendFile`/`res.sendfile`
* Fix incorrect 304 response when `If-None-Match` has both `*` and ETags
* Fix unsafe URI characters in redirect location
* Remove unnecessary escaping when `res.location` redirects to root
* deps: accepts@~1.3.3
  * Fix including type extensions in parameters in `Accept` parsing
  * Fix parsing `Accept` parameters with quoted equals
  * Fix parsing `Accept` parameters with quoted semicolons
  * Many performance improvments
  * deps: mime-types@~2.1.11
  * deps: negotiator@0.6.1
* deps: content-type@~1.0.2
  * perf: enable strict mode
* deps: cookie@0.3.1
  * Add `sameSite` option
  * Fix cookie `Max-Age` to never be a floating point number
  * Improve error message when `encode` is not a function
  * Improve error message when `expires` is not a `Date`
  * Throw better error for invalid argument to parse
  * Throw on invalid values provided to `serialize`
  * perf: enable strict mode
  * perf: hoist regular expression
  * perf: optimize internal loop
  * perf: use for loops over regular expressions
* deps: finalhandler@0.5.0
  * Change invalid or non-numeric status code to 500
  * Overwrite status message to match set status code
  * Prefer `err.statusCode` if `err.status` is invalid
  * Set response headers from `err.headers` object
  * Use `statuses` instead of `http` module for status messages
  * deps: escape-html@~1.0.3
  * deps: on-finished@~2.3.0
  * deps: statuses@~1.3.0
  * perf: enable strict mode
  * perf: remove unnecessary array allocations
* deps: fresh@0.3.0
  * Add weak `ETag` matching support
  * perf: enable strict mode
  * perf: remove unnecessary boolean coercions
* deps: http-errors@~1.5.0
  * Add `HttpError` export, for `err instanceof createError.HttpError`
  * Support new code `421 Misdirected Request`
  * Use `setprototypeof` module to replace `__proto__` setting
  * deps: inherits@2.0.1
  * deps: statuses@~1.3.0
  * perf: enable strict mode
* deps: methods@~1.1.2
  * perf: enable strict mode
* deps: on-finished@~2.3.0
  * Add defined behavior for HTTP `CONNECT` requests
  * Add defined behavior for HTTP `Upgrade` requests
  * deps: ee-first@1.1.1
* deps: parseurl@~1.3.1
  * perf: enable strict mode
* deps: path-to-regexp@0.1.7
  * Fix typo in README
  * perf: enable strict mode
* deps: proxy-addr@~1.1.2
  * Fix accepting various invalid netmasks
  * Fix IPv6-mapped IPv4 validation edge cases
  * IPv4 netmasks must be contiguous
  * IPv6 addresses cannot be used as a netmask
  * deps: ipaddr.js@1.1.1
* deps: qs@6.2.0
  * Add `decoder` option in `parse` function
* deps: range-parser@~1.2.0
  * Fix incorrectly returning -1 when there is at least one valid range
  * perf: remove internal function
* deps: send@0.14.1
  * Add `acceptRanges` option
  * Add `cacheControl` option
  * Attempt to combine multiple ranges into single range
  * Correctly inherit from `Stream` class
  * Fix `Content-Range` header in 416 responses when using `start`/`end` options
  * Fix `Content-Type` header being sent in 304 response
  * Fix parsing `Range` header when using `acceptRanges`
  * Fix response complete being sent for 404 response
  * Fix sending complete body for multi range request
  * Honor `options.start` in `sendfile` for non-range requests
  * Use `http-errors` for standard emitted errors
  * Use `statuses` instead of `http` module for status messages
  * deps: escape-html@~1.0.3
  * deps: http-errors@~1.5.0
  * deps: range-parser@~1.2.0
  * deps: statuses@~1.3.0
  * perf: remove unnecessary array allocations
* deps: serve-static@1.11.1
  * Add `fallthrough` option
  * Fix reading options from options prototype
  * Improve the default redirect response headers
  * Prefer `err.statusCode` if `err.status` is invalid
  * deps: send@0.14.1
  * perf: remove argument reassignment
* deps: type-is@~1.6.13
  * Fix type error when given invalid type to match against
  * deps: mime-types@~2.1.11
* deps: vary@~1.1.0
  * Only accept valid field names in the `field` argument

## 4.10.0 / 2014-09-29

* Add `app.set('etag', val)` setting for controlling `ETag` generation
* Add `req.fresh` and `req.stale` for HTTP caching
* Add `res.location` as an alternative to `res.set('Location', url)`
* Dependency updates
* Etag generation now controlled by the `etag` setting
* Express now respects previous `Content-Type` set through `res.set`
* Methods are now case-insensitive in `app.METHOD`
* Mounting to an express app that is not yet setup is allowed
* Nested routers are now properly initialized
* Remove implicit charset from `res.send`
* Remove support for multiple callback arguments to `res.sendfile`
* Support mounting regular middleware on `Router`

## 4.4.0 / 2014-05-11

* Add `res.sendfile` E-Tag support
* Add `req.hostname` for hostname of request
* Add `req.protocol` for protocol of request
* Fix behavior of `X-Forwarded-Proto` with proxies
* Fix `req.secure` check for non-encrypted proxied requests
* Fix `req.host` for IPv6 literals in `Host` header
* Fix `res.jsonp` error if callback param is object
* Fix `res.send` for empty Buffer
* Fix unknown charset handling in `res.send`
* Move `connect` to `peerDependencies`
* Use `on-finished` everywhere instead of custom code
* deps: debug@0.8.0
* deps: send@0.1.3
  * Default directory access to 403 when index disabled
  * Fix redirect when path starts with null byte
  * deps: debug@0.8.0

## 4.3.2 / 2014-05-07

* Fix handling of errors from router-level middleware

## 4.3.1 / 2014-05-04

* Fix error when `res.charset` used but not set
* Fix error when `res.send(status)` used
* Fix possible logging of sensitive data by `res.send`
* Fix regression with `res.send(status, num)`
* Fix setting `res.locals` properties to functions
* Fix status code when using `res.jsonp(status, object)`
* Fix behavior when `req.params` is `{}`
* Fix handling of errors from `router.param()` callbacks

## 4.3.0 / 2014-05-01

* Fix `res.charset` to include the charset in Content-Type
* Fix `res.send(status, num)` to send `num` as json
* Fix issue with `res.send(status, {status:num})` as json
* Fix `res.send(status, fn)` to invoke as error handler
* Fix `res.send(status, fn(req, res, next))` to invoke as error handler
* Deprecate `res.redirect(status, url)` -- use `res.redirect(url)` with preceding `res.status(status)`
* Deprecate `res.send(body, status)` -- use `res.status(status).send(body)`
* Deprecate `res.json(status, obj)` -- use `res.status(status).json(obj)`
* Deprecate `res.jsonp(status, obj)` -- use `res.status(status).jsonp(obj)`
* Deprecate `req.accepted*` -- use `req.accepts*()` instead
* Deprecate `req.acceptedLanguages` -- use `req.acceptsLanguages()` instead
* Deprecate `req.acceptedCharsets` -- use `req.acceptsCharsets()` instead
* Deprecate `req.acceptedEncodings` -- use `req.acceptsEncodings()` instead
* Deprecate `req.is()` -- use `req.headers['content-type']` instead
* Deprecate `req.params[0]` -- use `req.params` instead (from router)
* Deprecate `req.params.length` -- use `req.params` instead (from router)
* Deprecate `res.json(obj, status)` -- use `res.status(status).json(obj)` instead
* Deprecate `res.jsonp(obj, status)` -- use `res.status(status).jsonp(obj)` instead
* Deprecate `res.send(body, status)` -- use `res.status(status).send(body)` instead
* Support `res.set('Content-Type', 'text/plain')` as short for `res.type('text/plain')`
* Support `res.set('Content-Type', 'text/plain; charset=utf-8')` as short for `res.type('text/plain').charset('utf-8')`

## 4.2.0 / 2014-04-25

* Add `app.route` as alias for `app.all` (to be more like Router)
* Add `app.route(path)` to create `express.Route` instances
* Add `req.accepts*` as aliases for `req.accepted*`
* Add `req.acceptsEncoding` as alias for `req.acceptedEncodings`
* Add `req.acceptsLanguage` as alias for `req.acceptedLanguages`
* Add `res.location` as alias for `res.set('Location', url)`
* Add `res.type` as alias for `res.set('Content-Type', type)`
* Add `res.vary` as alias for `res.set('Vary', header)`
* Add Router#all to match all HTTP methods
* Add Router#route to create Route instances
* Use `methods` module for installed HTTP methods
* Default status in `res.jsonp` to 200
* Default status in `res.render` to 200
* Default status in `res.send` to 200 (was 200 or 500)
* Fix `req.acceptsEncoding` to return encoding
* Fix `req.acceptsLanguage` to return language
* Fix `req.path` to return modified URL pathname
* Fix behavior of methods using `res.set` to ignore `undefined`
* Fix handling of request `+` as space
* Fix handling of empty `Accept-Encoding`
* Fix handling of improper `Accept-Encoding`
* Fix behavior of `res.charset = ""` to un-set the charset
* Fix `res.send(status)` to correctly send the status as the body
* Fix `res.send(status, num)` to correctly send the status as the body
* Fix setting of `.charset` after `.type` was called on response
* Deprecate `app.del` -- use `app.delete` instead
* Deprecate `res.charset()` -- use `res.set('charset', charset)` instead
* Deprecate `res.headerSent` -- use `res.headersSent` instead
* Deprecate `express.createServer()` -- it has been deprecated for a long time

## 4.1.2 / 2014-04-24

* Fix `"trust proxy"` setting to inherit when app is mounted

## 4.1.1 / 2014-04-24

* Fix error during OPTIONS request for routes mounted on another app
* Fix `res.jsonp` error if callback contains `"}`
* Fix `req.host` when using "trust proxy" and host has port

## 4.1.0 / 2014-04-24

* Add `Router` constructor exported from express module
* Add `res.sendStatus(statusCode)` helper function
* Add `res.sendfile` directory support
* Add support for `app.set('trust proxy fn', function)` to customize proxy trust
* Add `req.subdomains` array
* Add `req.protocol` support for X-Forwarded-Proto as "trust proxy"
* Add `res.append(header, val)` to append headers
* Add escaping of `"` in quoted cookies
* Add handling of `OPTIONS` requests to `router.all`
* Add `.default` as alias for middleware handler
* Fix behavior of `res.status` with invalid status codes
* Fix handling of `null` and `undefined` in `req.query`
* Fix listed range header exposition
* Fix array handling in `req.fresh`/`req.stale`
* Fix `If-None-Match: *` header handling
* Fix `res.location` to handle array query params
* Fix multiple Set-Cookie headers via `res.append`
* Fix empty `res.jsonp()` response
* Fix handling of empty `res.send()` response
* Fix transition of bad `req.protocol`
* Use `content-type` module for content-type handling

## 4.0.0 / 2014-04-09

* Remove default charset from `res.send`
* Remove charset handling from `res.json`
* Remove implicit charset from `res.send(Buffer)`
* Remove implicit charset from `res.render`
* Remove transfer `.part` of range header in `res.sendfile`
* Fix behavior of `res.set` with array values
* Fix handling of multiple ETag headers
* Use `on-finished` instead of `finished`
* Use `escape-html` for escaping html
* Use `content-disposition` for content-disposition
* Use `media-typer` for media types
* Use `mime-types` for mime types
* Use `methods` for http methods
* Use `parseurl` for url parsing
* Use `proxy-addr` for proxy address parsing
* Use `type-is` for content-type parsing
* Use `vary` for Vary header
* Use `cookie-signature` for cookie signing
* Use `cookie` for cookie parsing
* Use `accepts` for content negotiation
* Use `debug` for debugging
* Use `path-to-regexp` for routing
* Use `finalhandler` for final response handling
* Use `send` for serving static files
* Use `csurf` for CSRF protection middleware
* Use `connect-timeout` for timeout middleware
* Use `serve-index` for directory listing middleware
* Use `serve-favicon` for favicon middleware
* Use `serve-static` for static serving middleware
* Use `compression` for compression middleware
* Use `errorhandler` for error handling middleware
* Use `method-override` for HTTP method override middleware
* Use `cookie-parser` for cookie parsing middleware
* Use `express-session` for session middleware
* Use `morgan` for logging middleware
* Use `body-parser` for request body parsing
* Use `connect` as base foundation

  * perf: enable strict mode
  * perf: remove argument reassignment
* deps: mkdirp@0.5.1
  * Work in global strict mode
* deps: send@0.13.0
  * Allow Node.js HTTP server to set `Date` response header
  * Fix incorrectly removing `Content-Location` on 304 response
  * Improve the default redirect response headers
  * Send appropriate headers on default error response
  * Use `http-errors` for standard emitted errors
  * Use `statuses` instead of `http` module for status messages

* Added CORS example

* Added stylus example
* Added ejs example
* Added better test coverage
* Added new examples
* Added "trust proxy" setting
* Added "jsonp callback" setting
* Added "jsonp callback name" setting
* Added "json spaces" setting
* Added route segment preconditions
* Added support for arbitrary methods to `app.param()`
* Added parsing of "X-Forwarded-Proto" header
* Added "case sensitive routing" setting
* Added "strict routing" setting

* Added `req.protocol`
* Added `req.secure`
* Added `req.path`
* Added `req.ips`
* Added "trust proxy" setting
* Added `req.fresh` / `req.stale`
* Fixed view engine signature
* Fixed res.cookie() bug when "signed" omitted
* Fixed route middleware
* Fixed `req.host` for IPv6 literals
* Fixed `res.redirect()` JSONP support
* Fixed "subdomain offset" setting to offset from TLD
* Fixed stylus example
* Fixed jade layout example
* Fixed `res.send()` 204 status support
* Fixed `res.send()` content-type
* Fixed `res.send(null)` to use "text/plain"
* Fixed route segment preconditions to use `==`
* Fixed jsonp callback escape
* Fixed `res.format()` to ensure handlers always default to "default"
* Fixed route segment capturing with modifiers
* Fixed `req.ip` trust proxy setting support
* Fixed `req.ip` IPv6 support
* Fixed `req.subdomains` for IPv6 literals
* Fixed `req.path` trailing slash
* Fixed `req.path` root support
* Fixed support for non-object `next(err)` values
* Changed: refactored router
* Changed: provide `err.status` to not found handlers
* Changed: `res.send()` supporting `res.send(status, num)`
* Changed: using connect's mime module
* Changed: error handling
* Changed: removed cjs and `app.mounted()` legacy cruft
* Changed: better support for `"view engine"` setting
* Changed: `res.cookie()` to accept "signed" as an object property
* Changed: `res.cookie()` to convert non-string values to JSON
* Changed: `res.send(null)` to respond with 204 by default
* Changed: using array for `req.acceptedEncodings`
* Changed: using array for `req.acceptedCharsets`
* Changed: using array for `req.acceptedLanguages`
* Changed: renamed "home" setting to "root"
* Changed: renamed "views/partials" setting to "views/""partials"
* Changed: renamed "view options" setting to "view"
* Changed: utilize `connect.compress()` for compression
* Changed: using "etag" header for weak ETags
* Changed: default "jsonp callback name" to "callback"
* Changed: renamed "compiler" to "extensions" in "view" setting
* Changed: `res.download()` to use basename on "filename" param
* Changed: `res.send()` to use "text/plain" for Buffers
* Changed: don't bother with "safe" encoding for JSONP
* Changed: default charset to utf-8
* Changed: preceding `./` not required for local modules
* Changed: `res.render()` without callback performs auto-response
* Changed: `res.render()` accepts status to respond with
* Changed: `res.redirect()` accepts status to respond with
* Changed: moved connect static middleware before router for performance
* Removed "home" setting
* Removed .createServer() function
* Removed "stream threshold" setting
* Removed custom error handling logic
* Removed "reload views" setting
